description:
Exposes GitHub repository operations as agent tools.
Covers files, issues, pull requests, reviews, releases, workflows, orgs, users,
code search, and commit history.

defaultRepo.description: Default repo in owner/repo format (e.g. acme/myapp). Tool calls that omit the repo parameter will use this value.
defaultRepo.title: Default Repository

readOnly.description: When enabled, all write operations (file create/edit/delete, issue create, PR create, etc.) are blocked. Safe for agents that should only read.
readOnly.title: Read-only mode

token.description: GitHub PAT with repo, issues, pull_requests, and workflows scopes. Use a fine-grained token scoped to only the repos you need.
token.title: Personal Access Token

title: GitHub
